theme.footer_note: FEDI DARYN TEST - APRIL COME SHE WILL

featured.featured_item_title: Fedi test - April come she will
featured.subject_subtitle: Bringing an outside perspective to AI transformation & delivery
featured.summary: Bryan shared his experiences with Agentic workflows and his journey from AI-denialist to AI-advocate. This series brings fresh, external perspective to how we think about AI at scale.

client_pipeline.ask: Build an Agentic operational platform within AWS
client_pipeline.answer: Platform for all Flutter UKI sub-brands + Agent marketplace for all teams

client_pipeline.ask: Analyse AI delivery capability and maturity
client_pipeline.answer: 3 CF domain teams proposed transformation on Customer Service — AI-enabled self-service

client_pipeline.ask: Drive AI adoption within Royal London teams
client_pipeline.answer: Embed a Principal Engineer as first mover, 50/50 on delivery and transformation

client_pipeline.ask: Support Zuto — a scaling car finance broker in rapid growth
client_pipeline.answer: CF as transformation partner, Agentic AI to drive efficiencies and improve white-glove service

evangelist_shoutouts.key_insight: AI being embedded at scale into day-to-day engineering practices
Laying the groundwork and identifying high-value use cases before scaling
Tangible productivity gains and improved team experience through AI + process change
